word: apple
meaning: 苹果
pos: n.
phonetic: /ˈæpəl/
emoji: 🍎
morphology: []
collocations: [{"phrase":"eat an apple","example":"I eat an apple after lunch. / 我午饭后吃一个苹果。"}]
irregularForms: []
synonyms: []
wordFamily: []
tip: apple 的复数直接加 -s。

word: go
meaning: 去；走
pos: v.
phonetic: /ɡəʊ/
emoji: 🚶
morphology: []
collocations: [{"phrase":"go home","example":"I go home at five. / 我五点回家。"},{"phrase":"go to school","example":"We go to school every day. / 我们每天上学。"}]
irregularForms: [{"label":"过去式","form":"go → went"},{"label":"过去分词","form":"go → gone"}]
synonyms: []
wordFamily: []
tip: go home 中 home 前不加 to。
